TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Aepulasite'.Tule Dei :Albrecht D√ľrerÔľõ cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku cacay (1471) a mihcaan lima a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay a dimiad katukuh i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku walu (1528) a mihcaan sepat a bulad enem a dimiad, Dekuo teban nu seci tu hedek, wenihusin sasinganganay numikulitay a tademaw, sapaday mikulitay a tademaw, mituktukay a tademaw atu nalimaan matinengay misilemed tu kamu a tademaw. Aepulasite'.TuleťėŅÁąĺŚłÉťõ∑ŚłĆÁČĻ‚ÄĘśĚúŚčí(DeiŚĺ∑Ť™ě:Albrecht D√ľrerÔľõ (1471)ŚĻī5śúą21śó•Ôľć1528ŚĻī4śúą6śó•), . tusa a mihcaan tu pina cinida singanganay tu i sapaday amikulitay a tademaw mamin ku Ocuo a tademaw cinidaan, sakamusa ku tademaw cinidaan amisay wenihusin sakapahay nu sayaway nalimaan mikulitay a tademaw nu Ocuo mikulitay tu hekal a tademawan, nituktukan nida tu sapadan masabaluhay baluhan ku natangahan. . ci Tule misuayaw cinida tu Itali wenihusin a nikatinengan, alaen nida ku Luoma nakunkuan pataydan nida i Ocuo amisan a nalimaan, uyni han cinida malaamisay nu wenihusin sakaetiman nu mikulitay a tademaw, yadah tu ku kakamuen nida, picidekan han u sasausien nanay a sasausian, micumud atu udip a sakalecad. . naudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ nilecuhan nida i Niw-lunpaw a misakinmay a luma, wama nida ci Aepu-laysite'.tule naw Cenya-li kungtin misangaay tu kim, sa malimad tayda i Niwlun-paw . "miinuli a limaÁ•ąÁ¶ĪÁöĄťõôśČč"Áī†śŹŹinpicu ku sapikulit wawa henay, ci Tule mikilul cinida ciamaan nida minanam tu nalimaan tu kim, sabaw tu lima a mihcaan malingatu tacuwacuwa micudad, mikilul ci Wake-muote' minanam mikulit atu mituktuk tu sapat, kilul sa taydan nida i Ae-sa'se , Pace-e atu Sete'la-sepaw . kilul sa u saka etiman nida pinanaman kina tusa tayda i I'tali miliwku, ci Tule tawya masasuadih cinida tu mikulitay a tademaw ci Ciw-wani. Pa'li'-ni atu ci lapai-e nuheni, mikinkiw tuni Tawensi a nalimaan atu nalimaan a kamuan, milihida tu nananaman tu wenyifusin a nidatengan atu wayway. . malawama tu numikulitay cinidaŤá™ÁēęŚÉŹšĻčÁą∂ Tule i sabaw tu tulu a mihcaan (1484) cinida tu kumikulitay tu cinidaan, mikikaka tu ci Tawensian tu nalimaan a nikulitan tu mikiayaw tu tusa a bataan a mihcaan. . tunikaudipan nida, sabaw tu pina kunipikulitan tu cinidaan tu a kakulitan, pasu besut sananay anipisulitan, pakunida sa mikulit, i sapad mikulit atu simal a nikulitan tu natangahan a nalimaan, nikulitan cinidaan micidek kunipisadimel tn nalimaan, nalimaan a nipatahekal atu nikudanay ci Lunpuolan masasuadih. sisa, ci Tule pangangaan han matinengay mikulit tu udip a wama. Tule katalan, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan anikulitan tu ingki, nika ci Tule caay henay pakaadih tu katalan. ci Tule inikudan satu sakay tini i nalimaan tabaki kuni kalalidan, micidek kunipikulitan tu sapadan, tawyaay a tademaw mapalekal namin mangalay matineng tu nikulitan nida a kawaw, nikulitan nida itini sa i pinaay a macimacian a tahekal, u udip namin kumisingaay. kasingaanan nida mamin ku Ocuo matineng, mapalekal ku matinengay mikulit a tademaw ci Lpaie.senciaw ,Ticiannuo.wiciwlue atu ci Fuolansiseke.paemiciwninuo , mapacuduh atu mapalekal kinamikulitay, milihida tu mikulit i sapadan. ci Tule imalahulay a sapadan nu natangahan tu nalimaan malalit ku Deku o a matinengay mikulit a tademaw, mahida ci Linluo mitaneng mikulit tu i malahulay a sapadan, nikudan satu mitulin cinida tu wayway ni Tule tu adidiay madadecdecay anipikulitan. . Lukase. Fun.laytun cida a cacay itini i sabaw tu enem a secian tu ayaw tulu a bataan nu mihcaan malaheci nida ku tabakiay nu malahulay a sapadan mikulit tu Ocuo amisa nu mikulitay a tademaw. nika itini i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (1515) a mihcaan tu nikudan, ci Marcantonio misatahaw tu baluhay a malahulay nu sapadan, milakuyd tu Aepaisesan misakakawaw tu amisay nu malahulay nu sapadan a kawawan, hamaw satu a mapalalid. Tule' mikinkiw tu nu tademawan atu milihida tu aenengan nu misumad tu misuayaw mikilim tu nikasumadan nu bihid anipikulitan mapale ku balucu ni Tasi.tanpusun ni kulitan"mulangaw atu waywayÁĒüťē∑ŚíĆŚĹĘśÖč", mahiniay ku sasakamuen nida. . sinicuo itini tu mihcaan i sepatay a bulad enem a demiad mikining ci Tule an, atu ci Lawlukase,ke'lanahe' atu Hans Burgkmair pulung han mikining. Hans BurgkmairšłÄŤĶ∑ÁīÄŚŅĶ. Dekuo a Waehala a biyuan sapikining tu likisiay musakamu tu Deyi a kamuan nu tademaw- "cenceciw,cuncu, kesiaciw atu isu'ciw"a singanganay a tademaw, idaw kuni Tule pangkiway a sassing. . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: a…ôpur~…ĺasit…ô Ē~ °.tur~…ĺ…ô d…ôi :ar~…ĺbr…ô ¶ńßt d*r…ôr* ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a dimiad katukuńß i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a dimiad, d…ôkuo t…ôban nu s…ô ¶i tu ńß…ôd…ôk, w…ônińßusin sasiŇčaŇčanaj numikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw, sapadaj mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw, mituktukaj a tad…ômaw atu nar~…ĺimaan matin…ôŇčaj misir~…ĺ…ôm…ôd tu kamu a tad…ômaw. a…ôpur~…ĺasit…ô Ē~ °.tur~…ĺ…ô*********(d…ôi**:ar~…ĺbr…ô ¶ńßt d*r…ôr* (****)****************), . tusa a mińß ¶aan tu pina ¶inida siŇčaŇčanaj tu i sapadaj amikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw mamin ku o ¶uo a tad…ômaw ¶inidaan, sakamusa ku tad…ômaw ¶inidaan amisaj w…ônińßusin sakapańßaj nu sajawaj nar~…ĺimaan mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw nu o ¶uo mikur~…ĺitaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a tad…ômawan, nituktukan nida tu sapadan masabar~…ĺuńßaj bar~…ĺuńßan ku nataŇčańßan. . ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô misuajaw ¶inida tu itar~…ĺi w…ônińßusin a nikatin…ôŇčan, ar~…ĺa…ôn nida ku r~…ĺuoma nakunkuan patajdan nida i o ¶uo amisan a nar~…ĺimaan, ujni ńßan ¶inida mar~…ĺaamisaj nu w…ônińßusin saka…ôtiman nu mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw, jadańß tu ku kakamu…ôn nida, pi ¶id…ôkan ńßan u sasausi…ôn nanaj a sasausian, mi ¶umud atu udip a sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. . naudipan** nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida i niw-r~…ĺunpaw a misakinmaj a r~…ĺuma, wama nida ¶i a…ôpu-r~…ĺajsit…ô Ē~ °.tur~…ĺ…ô naw ¶…ônja-r~…ĺi kuŇčtin misaŇčaaj tu kim, sa mar~…ĺimad tajda i niwr~…ĺun-paw . "miinur~…ĺi a r~…ĺima*****"**inpi ¶u ku sapikur~…ĺit wawa ńß…ônaj, ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶inida ¶iamaan nida minanam tu nar~…ĺimaan tu kim, sabaw tu r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu ta ¶uwa ¶uwa mi ¶udad, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i wak…ô-muot…ô Ē~ ° minanam mikur~…ĺit atu mituktuk tu sapat, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tajdan nida i a…ô-sa Ē~ °s…ô , pa ¶…ô-…ô atu s…ôt…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺa-s…ôpaw . kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa u saka …ôtiman nida pinanaman kina tusa tajda i i Ē~ °tar~…ĺi mir~…ĺiwku, ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô tawja masasuadińß ¶inida tu mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶iw-wani. pa Ē~ °r~…ĺi Ē~ °-ni atu ¶i r~…ĺapai-…ô nuńß…ôni, mikinkiw tuni taw…ônsi a nar~…ĺimaan atu nar~…ĺimaan a kamuan, mir~…ĺińßida tu nananaman tu w…ônjifusin a nidat…ôŇčan atu wajwaj. . mar~…ĺawama tu numikur~…ĺitaj ¶inida***** tur~…ĺ…ô i sabaw tu tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan (****) ¶inida tu kumikur~…ĺitaj tu ¶inidaan, mikikaka tu ¶i taw…ônsian tu nar~…ĺimaan a nikur~…ĺitan tu mikiajaw tu tusa a bataan a mińß ¶aan. . tunikaudipan nida, sabaw tu pina kunipikur~…ĺitan tu ¶inidaan tu a kakur~…ĺitan, pasu b…ôsut sananaj anipisur~…ĺitan, pakunida sa mikur~…ĺit, i sapad mikur~…ĺit atu simar~…ĺ a nikur~…ĺitan tu nataŇčańßan a nar~…ĺimaan, nikur~…ĺitan ¶inidaan mi ¶id…ôk kunipisadim…ôr~…ĺ tn nar~…ĺimaan, nar~…ĺimaan a nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ atu nikudanaj ¶i r~…ĺunpuor~…ĺan masasuadińß. sisa, ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô paŇčaŇčaan ńßan matin…ôŇčaj mikur~…ĺit tu udip a wama. tur~…ĺ…ô katar~…ĺan, ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan anikur~…ĺitan tu iŇčki, nika ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pakaadińß tu katar~…ĺan. ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô inikudan satu sakaj tini i nar~…ĺimaan tabaki kuni kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan, mi ¶id…ôk kunipikur~…ĺitan tu sapadan, tawjaaj a tad…ômaw mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ namin maŇčar~…ĺaj matin…ôŇč tu nikur~…ĺitan nida a kawaw, nikur~…ĺitan nida itini sa i pinaaj a ma ¶ima ¶ian a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, u udip namin kumisiŇčaaj. kasiŇčaanan nida mamin ku o ¶uo matin…ôŇč, mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku matin…ôŇčaj mikur~…ĺit a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺpai…ô.s…ôn ¶iaw ,ti ¶iannuo.wi ¶iwr~…ĺu…ô atu ¶i fuor~…ĺansis…ôk…ô.pa…ômi ¶iwninuo , mapa ¶uduńß atu mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ kinamikur~…ĺitaj, mir~…ĺińßida tu mikur~…ĺit i sapadan. ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô imar~…ĺańßur~…ĺaj a sapadan nu nataŇčańßan tu nar~…ĺimaan mar~…ĺar~…ĺit ku d…ôku o a matin…ôŇčaj mikur~…ĺit a tad…ômaw, mańßida ¶i r~…ĺinr~…ĺuo mitan…ôŇč mikur~…ĺit tu i mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺaj a sapadan, nikudan satu mitur~…ĺin ¶inida tu wajwaj ni tur~…ĺ…ô tu adidiaj madad…ô ¶d…ô ¶aj anipikur~…ĺitan. . r~…ĺukas…ô. fun.r~…ĺajtun ¶ida a ¶a ¶aj itini i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian tu ajaw tur~…ĺu a bataan nu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nida ku tabakiaj nu mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺaj a sapadan mikur~…ĺit tu o ¶uo amisa nu mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw. nika itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß ¶aan tu nikudan, ¶i mar ¶antonio misatańßaw tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺaj nu sapadan, mir~…ĺakujd tu a…ôpais…ôsan misakakawaw tu amisaj nu mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺaj nu sapadan a kawawan, ńßamaw satu a mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid. tur~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° mikinkiw tu nu tad…ômawan atu mir~…ĺińßida tu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu misumad tu misuajaw mikir~…ĺim tu nikasumadan nu bińßid anipikur~…ĺitan mapar~…ĺ…ô ku bar~…ĺu ¶u ni tasi.tanpusun ni kur~…ĺitan"mur~…ĺaŇčaw atu wajwaj*****", mańßiniaj ku sasakamu…ôn nida. . sini ¶uo itini tu mińß ¶aan i s…ôpataj a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad mikiniŇč ¶i tur~…ĺ…ô an, atu ¶i r~…ĺawr~…ĺukas…ô,k…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺanańß…ô Ē~ ° atu ńßans burgkmair pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan mikiniŇč. ńßans burgkmair****. d…ôkuo a wa…ôńßar~…ĺa a bijuan sapikiniŇč tu r~…ĺikisiaj musakamu tu d…ôi a kamuan nu tad…ômaw- " ¶…ôn ¶…ô ¶iw, ¶un ¶u, k…ôsia ¶iw atu isu Ē~ ° ¶iw"a siŇčaŇčanaj a tad…ômaw, idaw kuni tur~…ĺ…ô paŇčkiwaj a sassiŇč. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: Aepulasite'.Tule Dei :Albrecht D√ľrerÔľõ cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku cacay (1471) a mihcaan lima a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay a dimiad katukuh i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku walu (1528) a mihcaan sepat a bulad enem a dimiad, Dekuo teban nu seci tu hedek, wenihusin sasinganganay numikulitay a tademaw, sapaday mikulitay a tademaw, mituktukay a tademaw atu nalimaan matinengay misilemed tu kamu a tademaw. Aepulasite'.TuleťėŅÁąĺŚłÉťõ∑ŚłĆÁČĻ‚ÄĘśĚúŚčí(DeiŚĺ∑Ť™ě:Albrecht D√ľrerÔľõ (1471)ŚĻī5śúą21śó•Ôľć1528ŚĻī4śúą6śó•), . tusa a mihcaan tu pina cinida singanganay tu i sapaday amikulitay a tademaw mamin ku Ocuo a tademaw cinidaan, sakamusa ku tademaw cinidaan amisay wenihusin sakapahay nu sayaway nalimaan mikulitay a tademaw nu Ocuo mikulitay tu hekal a tademawan, nituktukan nida tu sapadan masabaluhay baluhan ku natangahan. . ci Tule misuayaw cinida tu Itali wenihusin a nikatinengan, alaen nida ku Luoma nakunkuan pataydan nida i Ocuo amisan a nalimaan, uyni han cinida malaamisay nu wenihusin sakaetiman nu mikulitay a tademaw, yadah tu ku kakamuen nida, picidekan han u sasausien nanay a sasausian, micumud atu udip a sakalecad. . naudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ nilecuhan nida i Niw-lunpaw a misakinmay a luma, wama nida ci Aepu-laysite'.tule naw Cenya-li kungtin misangaay tu kim, sa malimad tayda i Niwlun-paw . "miinuli a limaÁ•ąÁ¶ĪÁöĄťõôśČč"Áī†śŹŹinpicu ku sapikulit wawa henay, ci Tule mikilul cinida ciamaan nida minanam tu nalimaan tu kim, sabaw tu lima a mihcaan malingatu tacuwacuwa micudad, mikilul ci Wake-muote' minanam mikulit atu mituktuk tu sapat, kilul sa taydan nida i Ae-sa'se , Pace-e atu Sete'la-sepaw . kilul sa u saka etiman nida pinanaman kina tusa tayda i I'tali miliwku, ci Tule tawya masasuadih cinida tu mikulitay a tademaw ci Ciw-wani. Pa'li'-ni atu ci lapai-e nuheni, mikinkiw tuni Tawensi a nalimaan atu nalimaan a kamuan, milihida tu nananaman tu wenyifusin a nidatengan atu wayway. . malawama tu numikulitay cinidaŤá™ÁēęŚÉŹšĻčÁą∂ Tule i sabaw tu tulu a mihcaan (1484) cinida tu kumikulitay tu cinidaan, mikikaka tu ci Tawensian tu nalimaan a nikulitan tu mikiayaw tu tusa a bataan a mihcaan. . tunikaudipan nida, sabaw tu pina kunipikulitan tu cinidaan tu a kakulitan, pasu besut sananay anipisulitan, pakunida sa mikulit, i sapad mikulit atu simal a nikulitan tu natangahan a nalimaan, nikulitan cinidaan micidek kunipisadimel tn nalimaan, nalimaan a nipatahekal atu nikudanay ci Lunpuolan masasuadih. sisa, ci Tule pangangaan han matinengay mikulit tu udip a wama. Tule katalan, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan anikulitan tu ingki, nika ci Tule caay henay pakaadih tu katalan. ci Tule inikudan satu sakay tini i nalimaan tabaki kuni kalalidan, micidek kunipikulitan tu sapadan, tawyaay a tademaw mapalekal namin mangalay matineng tu nikulitan nida a kawaw, nikulitan nida itini sa i pinaay a macimacian a tahekal, u udip namin kumisingaay. kasingaanan nida mamin ku Ocuo matineng, mapalekal ku matinengay mikulit a tademaw ci Lpaie.senciaw ,Ticiannuo.wiciwlue atu ci Fuolansiseke.paemiciwninuo , mapacuduh atu mapalekal kinamikulitay, milihida tu mikulit i sapadan. ci Tule imalahulay a sapadan nu natangahan tu nalimaan malalit ku Deku o a matinengay mikulit a tademaw, mahida ci Linluo mitaneng mikulit tu i malahulay a sapadan, nikudan satu mitulin cinida tu wayway ni Tule tu adidiay madadecdecay anipikulitan. . Lukase. Fun.laytun cida a cacay itini i sabaw tu enem a secian tu ayaw tulu a bataan nu mihcaan malaheci nida ku tabakiay nu malahulay a sapadan mikulit tu Ocuo amisa nu mikulitay a tademaw. nika itini i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (1515) a mihcaan tu nikudan, ci Marcantonio misatahaw tu baluhay a malahulay nu sapadan, milakuyd tu Aepaisesan misakakawaw tu amisay nu malahulay nu sapadan a kawawan, hamaw satu a mapalalid. Tule' mikinkiw tu nu tademawan atu milihida tu aenengan nu misumad tu misuayaw mikilim tu nikasumadan nu bihid anipikulitan mapale ku balucu ni Tasi.tanpusun ni kulitan"mulangaw atu waywayÁĒüťē∑ŚíĆŚĹĘśÖč", mahiniay ku sasakamuen nida. . sinicuo itini tu mihcaan i sepatay a bulad enem a demiad mikining ci Tule an, atu ci Lawlukase,ke'lanahe' atu Hans Burgkmair pulung han mikining. Hans BurgkmairšłÄŤĶ∑ÁīÄŚŅĶ. Dekuo a Waehala a biyuan sapikining tu likisiay musakamu tu Deyi a kamuan nu tademaw- "cenceciw,cuncu, kesiaciw atu isu'ciw"a singanganay a tademaw, idaw kuni Tule pangkiway a sassing. . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
